strengths: Long full-stack tenure across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) at current role
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, published AI products, or AI platform leadership
Title is Senior/Staff engineer; no Principal/Director-level IC scope or strategic advisory evidence
Limited cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK) and no recognized thought leadership in AI

key_factors.factor: Lacks recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
Below Principal/Director-level IC scope and strategic influence

response.justification: The role requires a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, deep cloud fluency, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers. The résumé shows ~15 years of solid full-stack engineering and a founder project (GISCollective), but the only AI signal is recent contribution to MCP tooling at re:cinq — no shipped AI products, no ML research, no AI platform leadership. Highest title is Staff, with no evidence of Principal-level scope, executive advisory, or industry recognition (talks are on web internals and GIS, not AI). Cloud experience is present but not platform-deep. Strong engineer, but materially under-qualified against this specific role's competencies.
